transcription.text: I've got something fantastic to show you from Kodak, just in time for Christmas. Give your family this brand new Kodak XL movie camera and new high-speed ectochrome film, and they can actually take movies without movie lights, without any special lighting. They can start Christmas morning. Remember, no movie lights. Every one of these scenes was lit just by the light that was there. Think of the movies you can take of your children while they're growing up. Just drop the high-speed ectochrome film in the XL movie camera and shoot, outdoors in bright sunlight, and then indoors, just by the lights in your own home, at the end of a happy day. That's a really extraordinary Christmas gift. Give your family a Kodak XL movie camera and high-speed ectochrome film for movies without movie lights. Kodak makes your pictures count. They really do.
